dispositions.rationale: The DB website dentalandbraces.com (shared across 9 locations) resolves to 'All Family Dental & Braces' (All Family / United Dental Partners), a known DSO on the block-list, which operates a Belmont Central office at 5708 W Fullerton Ave in this exact ZIP 60639. The shared_website_domain (reach 9) + shared_ein signals plus the friendly-PC naming ('Therese Moussa DDS PC') fit All Family/UDP's per-office PC structure; the researcher's 'Clark Dental Care' finding does not override the org NPI's direct DSO-domain tie. Rule 3 forbids accepting a known DSO brand as T2 — route to the adversarial verifier.

Ownership by Dr. Amy Maya (dentist-anesthesiologist AO) is real, so this is not corporate/DSO, but the T2 single-location claim is unverifiable: evidence is directory-only (npiprofile.com), db_context is large_group with provider_count=8 that the researcher explicitly could not corroborate, and two shared phones each reach 3 locations. The unexplained 8-provider roster plus the multi-office phone network for a mobile IV-sedation service contradict a clean single-location group; fail-closed per Rule 1's provider_count>=8 / large_group hold trigger and Rule 5's directory-only ceiling.

Hard signal ao_nonclinical_exec_title: the org NPI's authorized official is Salman Patel, titled 'Managing Member' with no clinical credential and a surname absent from both the provider roster (Ghani/Sheikh/Kukiratirat) and the practice name. A non-dentist managing member controlling a practice that fields ~8 named associate dentists with no identifiable owner-dentist is the classic stealth-MSO / friendly-PC pattern (especially under IL dentist-ownership rules). The researcher found no brand, but this structure must go through the adversarial pass rather than be accepted.

AO Dr. Mary Hanley is flagged 'OWNER DENTIST' and the ao_reaches_multiple_locations signal ties her to 2 location_ids; web confirms she operates two offices — 5643 N Fairfield (Chicago) and 2200 Waukegan Rd (Glenview) — i.e., her own dentist-owned 2-location group (T3 per Rule 6a). The shared-phone location (Pascale Christina DMD) is a co-located associate at the Chicago office, not corporate. Dentist ownership is confirmed with no DSO signal; corrected to dentist_multi at medium confidence since the second office is directory/AO-reach corroborated.

The assigned HIGH confidence rests on directory-only sources (vitadox, chamberofcommerce), which Rule 5 disallows, and an unresolved cross-location network sits unaddressed: the DB website is joshifamilydentistry.com (Dr. Tejas Joshi's practice in the same 60659 area) shared across 2 locations, plus a Data-Axle officer 'Jacob Lake' spanning 3 locations. The practice-name (Guterzon) vs domain (Joshi) conflict and floating associate make current ownership/structure unverifiable; none of these are known DSO brands, so this is contradictory rather than corporate — do not merge as a clean single-location group.

provider_count=0 and the researcher states this is the legal PC-name record for the SAME Evergreen Park office (10004 S Kedzie, Dr. Wesley Campin's 'Glow Dental') already carried on the unit's separate 'Glow Dental' row (827b2ed9490623cd) — an address/geocoding split off the active clinical NPI. Merging it as a distinct location would double-count the office. The db_corporate_conflict (dso_national with null affiliated_dso/PE) is a brandless heuristic label and is moot once the row is treated as a duplicate variant.

The practice's own site (elkgrovevillagedentist.com 'Meet the Doctors') verifies a third-generation family-run office since 1959 with Drs. Stefan and David Schumer at the single 901 Biesterfield Rd Suite 111 location; DB label is family_practice (independent). The stale_founder_history flag is merely the 1959 heritage language, and the two shared phone lines reaching co-located records are multi-line / multi-NPI artifacts of a long-established family office (provider_count=9). No DSO/MSO/PE signal — T2 stands.

The practice's own site (glenviewfamilydental.com 'Meet Dr. Cullinan') gives positive current proof Dr. Sean Cullinan has owned Glenview Family Dental since 2008. The shared_ein (364362306) and shared_phone both reach only one other location (dd7210ef320babbe) — the practice's own co-located second NPI record at the same office, a same-practice artifact (Rule 6b), not a multi-office network. DB family_practice (independent), no corporate/DSO signal; T2 dentist-owned stands.

The practice's own site (plumgrovedental.com 'Meet Our Doctors') confirms an independent 55-year-old single-location office at 222 N Plum Grove Rd staffed by 6+ named dentists (Luke, M. Luke, Topalo, Trunnell, Adeoti, Zingher), matching db provider_count~10 — a large single-location dentist group. Web checks show the shared_ein (260380122) / arlington-endodontics.com link points to Arlington Endodontics at a DIFFERENT address (504 N Plum Grove Rd) separately led by Dr. Bryan Eslinger, so the signal is a DB mis-attribution / at most a co-owned specialist billing arm, not corporate control. Dentist-owned independent — T2 stands.

Hard signal t1_group_entity_classification (DB small_group) is corroborated: the practice's own site and directories describe Randall Pointe Dental at 1000 S Randall Rd Suite 200, Geneva (phone (630) 984-9832 matches) as led by Dr. Kavita Nana with 'a skilled team' / associates who 'provide services together' — a multi-dentist group, not a solo owner-operator, so T1 is wrong per Rule 1. Ownership is confirmed dentist (Kavita Nana PC leads her own branded office), single location, no DSO signal — correct to single_loc_group at high confidence.
